ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "trim" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine */,
  "drivetype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drivetype */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission */,
  "fueltype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fueltype */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fueltype_id FOREIGN KEY ("fueltype_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fueltype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_drivetype_id FOREIGN KEY ("drivetype_id") REFERENCES vehicle_drivetypes ("drivetype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_drivetypes" (
  "drivetype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drivetype */,
  "drivetype_name" TEXT /* Name of the drivetype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drivetype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drivetype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission */,
  "gears" INTEGER /* Number of gears in the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fueltype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fueltype */,
  "fueltype_name" TEXT /* Name of the fueltype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fueltype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fueltype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "co2" INTEGER /* CO2 emissions */,
  "fe_score" INTEGER /* Fuel economy score */,
  "ghg_score" INTEGER /* Greenhouse gas score */,
  "nox" REAL /* NOx emissions */,
  "pm" REAL /* Particulate matter emissions */,
  "co" REAL /* CO emissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_economies" (
  "fuel_economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel economy record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "city" REAL /* City fuel economy */,
  "u_city" REAL /* Uncertainty in city fuel economy */,
  "highway" REAL /* Highway fuel economy */,
  "u_highway" REAL /* Uncertainty in highway fuel economy */,
  "combined" REAL /* Combined fuel economy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_economies_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_engine_specs" (
  "engine_spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine specification record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_engine_specs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "pv2" INTEGER /* Value of feature pv2 */,
  "pv4" INTEGER /* Value of feature pv4 */,
  "feature1" INTEGER /* Value of feature 1 */,
  "feature2" INTEGER /* Value of feature 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories_map" (
  "category_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category map record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_categories_map_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_categories_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_drivetypes_map" (
  "drivetype_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drivetype map record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "drivetype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drivetype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drivetype_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_drivetypes_map_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_drivetypes_map_drivetype_id FOREIGN KEY ("drivetype_id") REFERENCES vehicle_drivetypes ("drivetype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_transmissions_map" (
  "transmission_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission map record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_transmissions_map_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_transmissions_map_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_fuel_types_map" (
  "fueltype_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fueltype map record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "fueltype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fueltype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fueltype_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_fuel_types_map_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_fuel_types_map_fueltype_id FOREIGN KEY ("fueltype_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fueltype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_manufacturer_map" (
  "manufacturer_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer map record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_manufacturer_map_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_manufacturer_map_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES vehicle_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
